title: Black Road Cut
notes: Connects B3, C4, A4, and B5.
Black Road connector with hidden route office, sensor spillover gate, Sable/Deep Lantern cache, route booth, service ramps, and crawl doors.
Designed for Astro Van and small service vehicles; heavy Red Concord cars are slowed by ramps and pipe clutter.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
